title: OtpVerificationRequired
description: Event: `otp_verification_required`. Emitted when the agent workflow pauses because it needs the caller to complete OTP verification before proceeding with an authenticated action. Corresponds to smooth-operator's `AgentEvent::HumanInputRequired { Input }` for auth gates. The client should surface a channel-selection and OTP input UI. After the user selects a channel, the client may trigger OTP delivery via a separate flow; the `verify_otp` action submits the received code.

requestId.description: Echoes the `requestId` from the originating `send_message` action. Must be included in the `verify_otp` reply.
The request ID this verification belongs to.

toolId.description: Opaque identifier of the tool invocation awaiting verification.

actionDescription.description: Human-readable description of the action requiring verification, suitable for the consent UI.

availableChannels.description: Delivery channels available to send the OTP. The client should let the user choose.

timestamp.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the event was emitted.
